International football competition

The **1997 FIFA World Youth Championship**, known as the **1997 FIFA/[Coca-Cola](/wiki/Coca-Cola "Coca-Cola") World Youth Championship** for sponsorship purposes, was the 11th staging of the [FIFA World Youth Championship](/wiki/FIFA_U-20_World_Cup "FIFA U-20 World Cup"). It was held from 16 June to 5 July 1997 in [Malaysia](/wiki/Malaysia "Malaysia"). It was the first FIFA tournament hosted by a Southeast Asian country.

## Goalscorers

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1997_FIFA_World_Youth_Championship&action=edit&section=20 "Edit section: Goalscorers")]

In total, 165 goals were scored by 101 different players, with seven of them credited as own goals.
